name: Inappropriate Encoding for Output Context
description: The product uses an encoding for output that differs from what the downstream component expects, causing incorrect decoding that can break control/data boundaries and enable injection attacks that bypass input validation.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[encoding] applies an encoding scheme that does not match what EGRESS[output_context] or the downstream EXTERNAL[consumer] expects, without a CONTROL[encoding_validation] node ensuring encoding compatibility between producer and consumer
